positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a diverse group of fantastical creatures (e.g., bioluminescent forest fae, friendly deep-sea kraken, playful sky griffins, stylized woodland spirits) gathered in a celebratory, interconnected manner. The composition should be circular and highly symmetrical, featuring clean silhouettes and strong contrast. The color palette is saturated yet harmonious, focusing on jewel tones and electric pastels, with accents of metallic gold leaf texture. The scene must have a strong, recognizable pattern quality suitable for repeating apparel prints, utilizing graphic, vector-art styles mixed with detailed ink work. Studio lighting, high resolution, perfect symmetry, clean lines, centralized subject matter.
negative: blur, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, text, watermark, low detail, photorealism, messy, gradients, ugly, negative space, dirty
